candidates.why: Current portion of long-term debt; valid component of short-term debt if a cleaner total current borrowings line were unavailable.
Interest payable is not principal debt and should be excluded from STD.
Cash-flow movement, not a balance-sheet debt stock.
This balance-sheet row is a cleaner direct measure of current debt/borrowings and excludes the lease rows; preferred over maturities line when available.

variables.notes: Chose the balance-sheet total current debt line outside the shortlist because it is the cleanest direct STD measure. Excluded lease-related rows. Did not also select 'Debt - Long-Term - Maturities - within 1 Year' to avoid double counting.
No clear taxes payable/current tax liabilities balance-sheet row is present in the provided labels. 'Deferred tax liabilities' is non-current and not TXP.
